sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Royal Bank of Canada's (TSE:RY) Upcoming Dividend Will Be Larger Than Last Year's
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada (TSE:RY) announced an increase in its upcoming dividend to CA$1.64 per share. While the dividend yield is a modest 2.8%, the company has a strong track record of consistent dividend payments for over 10 years, with earnings covering the payout at 43%. Analysts project continued EPS growth and a sustainable payout ratio, making it an attractive stock for income-focused investors.

feed.title: Nexstar Media Group to Report 2025 Fourth Quarter Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast on February 26
feed.summary: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NXST) announced it will report its 2025 fourth-quarter financial results on Thursday, February 26, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET that morning to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the call via phone or live webcast through Nexstar's website.

feed.title: Trimble Stock Tests Investors’ Nerves As It Drifts Sideways Near 52?Week Highs
feed.summary: Trimble stock has outperformed the broader market over the past year, showing a 15% gain for investors, but has recently drifted sideways near its 52-week highs. Despite this consolidation, the overall trend remains bullish, driven by the company's shift towards software-rich workflows in connected construction and geospatial technology. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" or "Overweight" consensus with price targets implying a 10-15% upside, though future growth hinges on execution and subscription growth.

feed.title: Closing with purpose: Smucker’s farewell brings new hope to region
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. is closing its store and cafe on January 16, but is donating the building, land, and $1 million over five years to the Akron-Canton Regional Foodbank. This significant donation aims to address food insecurity across Northeast Ohio, where over 200,000 people, including 60,000 children, struggle with hunger. The move transforms a sad closure into a positive step towards expanded hunger relief efforts in the community.

feed.title: Despite getting flak for being woke and lazy, an exec at $62 billion giant Colgate says Gen Z workers are actually ‘pushing us to get better’
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive's chief human resources officer, Sally Massey, challenges the negative stereotypes about Gen Z workers, stating they are ambitious, tech-savvy, and bring fresh perspectives that push the company to innovate. Massey emphasizes the importance of bridging generational divides by encouraging senior leaders to listen to entry-level staffers. Other business leaders and academics also defend Gen Z, highlighting their cutting-edge skills, unique challenges, and the value they bring despite their unconventional approaches or perceived anxieties.
